app.title: WebShop
licensesAdmin.title: Tenant licenses
licensesAdmin.lead: Define catalog plans, assign a subscription to a tenant_id, and inspect usage vs limits. Only ADMIN.
licensesAdmin.seed_defaults: Create default plans (WS_START / WS_GROW / WS_PRO) if missing
licensesAdmin.name: Name
licensesAdmin.usage_need_tenant: Enter a tenant_id before loading usage or assigning a subscription.
licensesAdmin.unlimited_hint: Leave numeric limits empty for unlimited.
licensesAdmin.edit_blocked_hint: Clear the block reason and save to remove the payment block.
licensesAdmin.plan_code_readonly: Plan code cannot be changed (system identifier).
adminTenant.title: Choose company (tenant)
adminTenant.intro: As system admin you work in one shop at a time. Pick the tenant before using catalog, orders, or settings.
adminTenant.empty: No tenant profiles found in the database.
nav.sidebar_pin_hint_narrow: On phone and tablet the menu is always a panel; this setting applies when the window is wide enough.
nav.scan_order_hint: Point the camera at the order confirmation QR code. Camera access is required (HTTPS in production).
nav.mobileNav.minPins: Keep at least two items in the bottom bar.
nav.mobileNav.maxPins: At most {max} items in the bottom bar.
notif.legend: Blue “New” label and stronger row background = unread. “Read” = already opened or marked.
notif.reception.qty_accepted_line: Customer accepted the quantity change for “{product}” ({order}).
notif.reception.qty_declined_line: Customer declined the quantity change for “{product}” ({order}).
notif.customer.reception_batch_proposed: Reception proposed changes on order {order} ({n} item(s)).
notif.reception.customer_pending_bulk: Customer responded to proposals in bulk ({order}).
reports.title: Shop reports
reports.subtitle: Orders and revenue for the selected period (managers and owners).
reports.discount_revenue: Revenue from lines sold with a discount (snapshot)
reports.discount_catalog_now: Products currently on sale in catalog
reports.discount_hint: History: revenue from lines sold while a sale was active (stored per line). “Catalog now” counts products with an active discount.
reports.chart_status_hint: Share of orders in the period.
reports.chart_daily_hint: Order count and gross revenue per day.
reports.chart_products_hint: Up to 12 lines with the highest gross revenue.
reports.chart_source_hint: Orders and gross revenue per channel (source).
reports.embed_hint: For iframe embeds (e.g. Trainify): open this page with embed=true to hide chrome.
aiStaff.title: AI reports
aiStaff.subtitle: Ask about revenue, orders, locations and customers — answers use database aggregates (manager / owner).
aiStaff.placeholder: e.g. What sold best per location in March?
lang.label: Language
login.title: Sign in (local account)
shop.title: Shop
shop.promotion_landing_hint: All catalog-available products are shown, sorted by sale percent (highest first). Filters and sort apply as a tie-break when the percent is the same.
cart.title: Cart
checkout.title: Confirm order
checkout.rules_hint: Latest pickup date you can choose: today + {max_days} calendar days (inclusive). At least {min_hours} h ahead. When the order is “ready”, pickup must happen within {grace} h after the scheduled slot or it becomes “expired”. Tenant timezone: {tz}.
checkout.rules_load_error: Could not load pickup locations and order rules.
checkout.pickup_location_hint: Choose where you will pick up the order. You can change the default in the list above.
checkout.pickup_location_single_hint: This shop has one pickup site; it is assigned automatically.
checkout.no_pickup_locations: No active pickup locations are configured yet — the order will be placed without a site code. The shop can add locations under Company settings.
checkout.datetime_bounds: Approximate range on this device: {min} to {max} (the server also validates using the tenant timezone).
pickup.label: Pickup
order.title: Order
orders.list_hint: Track statuses here. If reception suggests a product replacement, open the order to accept or decline.
orders.buyer_placeholder: First name, last name or email
orders.empty_customer: You have no orders yet. After you check out from the shop, they will appear here.
orders.empty_staff: No orders match the current filters. Try “Reset” or change the criteria.
order.staff_evt.reception_batch_proposed: Batch change proposal sent to customer
order.line_review_hint: Click a line row in the table below. For each line you can propose a replacement or a lower quantity (only one per line). When finished, send all proposals to the customer with one button.
order.line_click_hint: Click the row — the editor opens right below (quantity / replacement).
order.one_change_per_line_hint: Per line in one proposal: either a product replacement or a lower quantity — not both at once.
order.propose_changes_hint: Nothing is sent until you click this. You can prepare several lines, then send once.
order.propose_nothing: No changes selected. Open a line and propose a replacement or quantity.
order.customer_pending_intro: Changes are grouped by line. You can respond to each one, or accept / reject all at once (unless a replacement has multiple product options).
order.customer_accept_all_blocked: “Accept all” is unavailable while any replacement has multiple options — pick a product for each of those first.
order.apply_qty_hint: The customer must accept before the quantity is applied and the order can be completed.
order.qty_must_be_lower: The number must be less than the current quantity.
order.qty_pending_staff_hint: The customer accepts or declines in their order view.
order.sub_pending_hint: The customer accepts or declines in their order view.
order.sub_history_intro_staff: The customer accepted or declined each proposal. A declined replacement does not remove the line — the original product stays until you remove it or send a new proposal.
order.line_sub_declined_title: The customer declined the latest replacement offer for this line. See history below or send a new offer.
order.confirm_remove_line: Remove this line from the order?
order.sub_need_pick: Select at least one replacement product.
order.sub_product_compare_intro: Compare each offered item (image, description, prices, VAT, unit) before you confirm.
order.sub_product_partial: Product details could not be loaded.
order.sub_product_unavailable: Currently not available in the catalog.
order.sub_pick_required: Select one of the offered products first.
reception.title: Orders
reception.staff_personal_orders_hint: For your own purchase (including quantity/substitution replies), use the shop and the list below; this screen is the desk queue for every tenant order.
reception.desk_gate_hint: Pick exactly one pickup location — you will only see and process orders for that location.
reception.desk_change_hint: Changing location refreshes the order list.
reception.desk_no_locations: There are no active locations in company settings. A manager must add locations under Settings → Company.
reception.desk_single_location_hint: This company has only one pickup location — it is assigned automatically.
reception.hint_busy: Wait for the current action to finish.
reception.hint_terminal: This order is finished, rejected, or expired — no further reception steps.
reception.hint_pending_customer: Waiting for the customer to respond to proposals (replacement or quantity).
reception.hint_approve_pending_confirm_o: You can approve the whole order only while it is “Pending reception”, with no open customer proposals.
reception.hint_approve_customer_rejected: The customer rejected the latest proposal on one or more lines — remove those lines (or send a new proposal) before approving the whole order.
reception.hint_ready_already_past: The order is already “Ready” or beyond — this action is not needed.
reception.hint_mark_ready_use_approve: For a new order use “Approve entire order” — it checks product availability and sets “Ready for pickup”.
reception.hint_mark_ready_partial_only: “Ready for pickup” here is only after substitutions are resolved (“Partial — awaiting replacement”, no open customer proposals).
reception.hint_pickup_needs_ready: Mark the order as “Ready” first, then “Picked up”.
manager.title: Products
manager.quantity_invalid: Quantity must be greater than zero.
manager.sale_percent_hint: 0 = no sale. Catalog net/gross prices stay stored; the shop shows the discounted price.
staff.title: Users
staff.intro: View and manage tenant accounts (including customers): roles you may assign, name and role changes, deactivation. In production the email is checked in Zitadel; locally against the database.
staff.cannot_edit_row: You are not allowed to change this record.
staff.email_readonly_edit: Email cannot be changed after creation.
product_modal.replacements_hint: Up to 3 products that may replace this one if it is unavailable.
product_modal.replacements_empty: No other products to pick as replacements.
tenant.title: Company & ordering rules
tenant.subtitle: Legal details, on-site locations, and scheduling / pickup policy (managers and owners).
tenant.max_schedule_days: Latest schedulable day (+ days from today)
tenant.max_schedule_days_hint: Last allowed pickup date = today + this many days (inclusive).
tenant.min_notice_hours_hint: Pickup time must be at least this many hours in the future.
tenant.pickup_grace_hours_hint: When status is “ready”, the customer must pick up within this many hours after the scheduled time or the order expires automatically.
tenant.locations_hint: Codes must be unique. Locations will later link to Trainify (which site the order is for).
tenant.theme.intro: Pick a background preset, accent color, and optional logo. Corner radius, base font, and optional button hover — preview updates before you save.
tenant.theme.preset.DARK_A: Dark A (same as default app look)
tenant.theme.logo: Logo (PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG, max 800 KB)
tenant.theme.logoCurrent: A logo is set. Upload a new file to replace it.
tenant.theme.confirmReset: Reset to default theme and remove the logo?
tenant.theme.borderRadiusHint: 0px — sharp; 16px — soft. One value for buttons, cards, and inputs.
tenant.telegram_bot_token_placeholder: Only when changing; save empty clears if you edited this field
tenant.telegram_chat_hint: Add the bot to the group/channel. Token can be set here per company; if empty, server TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is used.
tenant.notify_before_pickup: Minutes before exact pickup to remind
tenant.smtp_section: SMTP for customer emails (empty = server defaults)
catalog.ai_hint: Works when LLM_API_KEY is set on the backend (optionally LLM_PROVIDER / model — same as Trainify .env).
